mapper.sql: sc.id, sc.name, sc.cover_url, sc.summary, sc.description, sc.recommend_duration_min, sc.calories_per_hour, sc.recommend_frequency_per_week, sc.level, sc.status, sc.is_deleted, sc.sort_weight, sc.created_at, sc.updated_at
SELECT sca.course_id, GROUP_CONCAT(sa.name ORDER BY sa.id SEPARATOR ',') AS audiences_csv FROM sport_course_audience sca INNER JOIN sport_audience sa ON sa.id = sca.audience_id GROUP BY sca.course_id

SELECT sce.course_id, GROUP_CONCAT(se.name ORDER BY se.id SEPARATOR ',') AS equipments_csv FROM sport_course_equipment sce INNER JOIN sport_equipment se ON se.id = sce.equipment_id GROUP BY sce.course_id

SELECT scb.course_id, GROUP_CONCAT(sb.name ORDER BY scb.sort_order, sb.id SEPARATOR ',') AS benefits_csv FROM sport_course_benefit scb INNER JOIN sport_benefit sb ON sb.id = scb.benefit_id GROUP BY scb.course_id
mapper.select:
SELECT , IFNULL(scr.rating_avg, 0.00) AS rating_avg, IFNULL(scr.rating_count, 0) AS rating_count, NULL AS user_score, aud.audiences_csv, eq.equipments_csv, ben.benefits_csv FROM sport_course sc LEFT JOIN sport_course_rating scr ON scr.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN () aud ON aud.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN () eq ON eq.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN () ben ON ben.course_id = sc.id WHERE sc.is_deleted = 0
AND sc.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND sc.status = #{status}
ORDER BY sc.sort_weight DESC, sc.updated_at DESC, sc.id DESC
SELECT , NULL AS rating_avg, NULL AS rating_count, NULL AS user_score, NULL AS audiences_csv, NULL AS equipments_csv, NULL AS benefits_csv FROM sport_course sc WHERE sc.id = #{courseId} LIMIT 1

SELECT , IFNULL(scr.rating_avg, 0.00) AS rating_avg, IFNULL(scr.rating_count, 0) AS rating_count, NULL AS user_score, aud.audiences_csv, eq.equipments_csv, ben.benefits_csv FROM sport_course sc LEFT JOIN sport_course_rating scr ON scr.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN () aud ON aud.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN () eq ON eq.course_id = sc.id LEFT JOIN () ben ON ben.course_id = sc.id WHERE sc.id = #{courseId} AND sc.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sport_course ( name, cover_url, summary, description, recommend_duration_min, calories_per_hour, recommend_frequency_per_week, level, status, sort_weight ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{coverUrl}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{recommendDurationMin}, #{caloriesPerHour}, #{recommendFrequencyPerWeek}, #{level}, #{status}, #{sortWeight} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sport_course SET name = #{name}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, recommend_duration_min = #{recommendDurationMin}, calories_per_hour = #{caloriesPerHour}, recommend_frequency_per_week = #{recommendFrequencyPerWeek}, level = #{level}, status = #{status}, sort_weight = #{sortWeight} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE sport_course SET is_deleted = 1, status = 'archived' WHERE id = #{courseId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT audience_id FROM sport_course_audience WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY audience_id ASC
SELECT equipment_id FROM sport_course_equipment WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY equipment_id ASC
SELECT benefit_id FROM sport_course_benefit WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, benefit_id ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sport_course_audience ( course_id, audience_id ) VALUES
(#{courseId}, #{audienceId})

INSERT INTO sport_course_equipment ( course_id, equipment_id ) VALUES
(#{courseId}, #{equipmentId})

INSERT INTO sport_course_benefit ( course_id, benefit_id, sort_order ) VALUES
(#{courseId}, #{benefitId}, #{sortOrder})
